meaning: Koninklijke Luchtvaart Maatschappij 荷兰航空公司
examples: White conned his way into a job as a warehouseman with Dutch airline, KLM.
Air France-KLM group surged 2.5 percent as Citigroup Inc. recommended the shares.
Twice-daily KLM Royal Dutch Airlines flights between Thanet in east Kent and Amsterdam have begun.
The French state's stake in the Air France-KLM merger is set to be 44 percent.
